semantic_text: Bulbasaur | Grass and Poison type starter Pokemon from Kanto | A seed Pokemon with a plant bulb on its back that grows as it evolves
Ivysaur | Grass and Poison type Pokemon from Kanto | The bulb on its back grows larger as it absorbs nutrients to prepare for evolution
Venusaur | Grass and Poison type fully evolved Pokemon from Kanto | A massive Pokemon with a giant flower on its back that absorbs sunlight
Charmander | Fire type starter Pokemon from Kanto | A lizard Pokemon with a flame on its tail that indicates its health
Charmeleon | Fire type Pokemon from Kanto | An aggressive Pokemon that wields sharp claws and a fiery tail
Charizard | Fire and Flying type fully evolved Pokemon from Kanto | A dragon-like Pokemon that breathes intense flames hot enough to melt boulders
Squirtle | Water type starter Pokemon from Kanto | A tiny turtle Pokemon that sprays water from its mouth with great accuracy
Wartortle | Water type Pokemon from Kanto | Its fluffy tail is a symbol of longevity and is popular among older trainers
Blastoise | Water type fully evolved Pokemon from Kanto | A powerful Pokemon with twin water cannons on its shell that can blast through steel
Pikachu | Electric type Pokemon from Kanto | The iconic mouse Pokemon that stores electricity in its cheek pouches and releases powerful thunderbolts
Raichu | Electric type evolved Pokemon from Kanto | When electricity builds up in its body it becomes aggressive and glows in the dark
Eevee | Normal type Pokemon from Kanto | A unique Pokemon with unstable genetics that allow it to evolve into many different forms
Vaporeon | Water type Eevee evolution from Kanto | Its cell composition is similar to water molecules allowing it to melt into water
Jolteon | Electric type Eevee evolution from Kanto | Every hair on its body is a sharp needle that launches electric attacks
Flareon | Fire type Eevee evolution from Kanto | It stores thermal energy in its body and can heat the air to 3000 degrees
Mewtwo | Psychic type legendary Pokemon from Kanto | A genetically engineered Pokemon created from Mew DNA with immense psychic power
Mew | Psychic type mythical Pokemon from Kanto | Said to contain the DNA of every Pokemon making it capable of learning any move
Chikorita | Grass type starter Pokemon from Johto | A gentle leaf Pokemon that loves sunbathing and uses the sweet aroma from its leaf to calm others
Cyndaquil | Fire type starter Pokemon from Johto | A timid fire mouse Pokemon with flames on its back that flare up when startled
Totodile | Water type starter Pokemon from Johto | A small but powerful crocodile Pokemon with strong jaws that chomps on anything
Grass type | Strong against Water Ground and Rock | Weak to Fire Ice Poison Flying and Bug attacks
Fire type | Strong against Grass Ice Bug and Steel | Weak to Water Ground and Rock attacks
Water type | Strong against Fire Ground and Rock | Weak to Grass and Electric attacks
Electric type | Strong against Water and Flying | Only weak to Ground attacks
Psychic type | Strong against Fighting and Poison | Weak to Bug Ghost and Dark attacks
Normal type | No type advantages | Weak to Fighting attacks | Immune to Ghost
Poison type | Strong against Grass and Fairy | Weak to Ground and Psychic attacks
Flying type | Strong against Grass Fighting and Bug | Weak to Electric Ice and Rock attacks
Kanto region | The original Pokemon region from Generation 1 | Home to 8 gyms the Elite Four and legendary Pokemon like Mewtwo and Mew
Johto region | The second Pokemon region from Generation 2 | A region rich in history and tradition connected to Kanto with new Pokemon species
Hokkaido region | A northern Pokemon region known for ice and normal type Pokemon | Cold climate with unique evolutionary adaptations
Ash Ketchum | Pokemon trainer from Pallet Town in Kanto | The iconic trainer who travels with Pikachu and dreams of becoming a Pokemon Master
Misty | Water type gym leader of Cerulean City in Kanto | Specializes in Water type Pokemon and is one of Ash's closest traveling companions
Brock | Rock type gym leader of Pewter City in Kanto | A Pokemon breeder who dreams of becoming the world's best and travels with Ash
Gary Oak | Pokemon researcher and trainer from Pallet Town | Ash's rival and grandson of Professor Oak who later becomes a Pokemon researcher

properties.role: Gym Leader and Team Rocket Boss

semantic_text: Giovanni | Ground type gym leader and leader of Team Rocket | A powerful and mysterious trainer who controls Mewtwo and runs a criminal organization
